name: swapit
description: Stateful, local-first household toxics inventory + swap engine. Identify items carrying endocrine disruptors / persistent chemicals, score by real exposure, track swaps to safer alternatives, and find where to buy them via a public, geo-scoped, organically-grown procurement commons. Ships a grounded, cited knowledge graph. Hands sourcing to the procurer skill. Zero paid services.

mode.description: Skill mode: init (load seed knowledge), add (add an item), assess (score an item/class), list (inventory), swap (track a swap), score (household summary), report (HTML), procure (procurer handoff brief + known where-to-buy offers; record a found offer with --retailer/--region), knowledge (browse graph), rooms (manage rooms), bookmark (save a link), selfheal (validate integrity), serve (live local dashboard), contribute (queue an anonymized fact: product|hazard|alternative|procurement|item-class), sync (push/pull the commons, opt-in).

region.description: ISO-3166-1 alpha-2 country code for where-to-buy offers (procure/contribute procurement), e.g. US, CO, DE, GB.

alternative.description: Safer-alternative id a procurement offer is for (contribute procurement), e.g. cast-iron-skillet.

retailer.description: Public retailer/store name for a where-to-buy offer (procure/contribute procurement). NOT the user's private purchase vendor.

url.description: Public listing URL — where to buy online (procurement offers).

price_min.description: Public listing price low bound (procurement offers).

price_max.description: Public listing price high bound (procurement offers).

currency.description: ISO-4217 currency code for an offer price (e.g. USD, COP, EUR).

as_of.description: ISO date a listing price was observed (procurement offers; drives forward-only price freshening).

area.description: City/area a retailer serves, display-only (procurement offers).

category.description: Item-class category when proposing a new taxonomy node (contribute item-class), e.g. kitchen, bathroom, baby-kids.

item_class.description: Item-class id from the knowledge graph (add/assess), e.g. nonstick-cookware, polycarbonate-bottle, vinyl-shower-curtain.

target.description: Item id or swap id (procure mode).

room.description: Room/zone for an item (kitchen, bathroom, bedroom, nursery, garage, ...).

condition.description: Physical condition — damaged/scratched coatings leach more.

frequency.description: How often the item is used (drives exposure weighting).

heat.description: Item is used with heat (cooking, hot liquids, microwave).

child_contact.description: Item is mouthed/handled by a child (amplifies risk).

to.description: Chosen alternative id (swap mode), e.g. cast-iron-skillet, glass-food-container.

json.description: Emit machine-readable JSON instead of formatted text.
